CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-20-2008 AT 1:30PM. HAVING REVIEWED THE FILE, INCLUDING DEFENDANT'S SEPTEMBER 11, 2008 DECLARATION STATING THAT DEFENDANT HAD BEEN DISCHARGED IN BANKRUPTCY FROM ANY LIABILITY TO PLAINTIFF, AND THERE BEING NO OPPOSITION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THIS CASE IS DISMISSED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CARLITO MANDIA, CSR# 9689. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
